title: frangula tomentella
intro: Frangula tomentella, also known as the velvety buckthorn or cascara buckthorn, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains anthraquinone glycosides that stimulate bowel movements and have laxative effects. The health benefits of Frangula tomentella include treating constipation, diarrhea, and digestive issues, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Frangula tomentella can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction by steeping the dried bark in hot water, which is then consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
